match: Waiting for a runner to pick up this job
Job is waiting for a hosted runner to come online
patterns.summary: GitHub-hosted runner capacity delay before job starts.
action_items: Rerun only the latest deploy after recovery.

patterns.summary: External GitHub platform incident (Actions/Pages start delays).
action_items: Rerun latest deploy after platform recovery.

patterns.summary: GitHub API rate limit hit.

match: exceeded the GitHub Pages rate limit
patterns.summary: GitHub Pages publish rate limit.
action_items: Do not push report-only commits that trigger deploy.

patterns.summary: One merge fans out into deploy + snapshot + content-direction + autofix loops.
action_items: Skip doctor/autofix when only reports changed.

patterns.summary: Old QA/image debt fails full-site checks and blocks unrelated deploys.
action_items: Strict QA only on changed/new files for deploy gate.
Keep old debt in baseline ledger.
Batch debt fixes in separate qa-debt-fix PRs.

patterns.summary: Changed/new post is missing a verified hero image.
action_items: Generate self-hosted hero for changed posts only.

patterns.summary: process_images expected provider direct_url for a self-owned/generated image.
action_items: Skip direct_url requirement for self-owned images.

patterns.summary: Creator empty is valid when source/license verified but creator unavailable.
action_items: Treat creator empty as OK when image_attribution_source indicates creator unavailable.

patterns.summary: Fake or blocked image creator values are policy-fatal.
action_items: Use self_generated attribution for self-owned assets.

patterns.summary: Post date missing timezone or stamped in UTC instead of Vietnam time.
Content Direction rendered empty (wrong path/data key/empty fallback).
action_items: Never overwrite valid JSON with empty report.
Remove Image / Attribution Risk from Content Direction.

patterns.summary: Merge succeeded but live site still serves old artifact.
action_items: Rerun latest deploy once if stale.

patterns.summary: GitHub Pages still serving previous artifact after deploy job.
Hardcoded absolute paths omit /reviewchanthat/ base path.
action_items: Never hardcode root-relative paths without base.

patterns.summary: noindex pages incorrectly included in sitemap.
Hardcoded /series/ paths break project-page baseURL.
AI summary contains Go map[] serialization artifacts.
QA expects a footer/product element that product intentionally removed.
action_items: Do not re-add removed footer links just to pass QA.

patterns.summary: Article/table UX regression: too wide or desktop table scroll.
Hugo build/render error.
action_items: Autofix only if matched known template regression.

patterns.summary: Deploy workflow did not complete successfully.
action_items: Rerun latest deploy after rootcause fixed.

patterns.summary: Template/render regression in Hugo layouts.
action_items: Fix layout/partial with minimal scoped change.

patterns.summary: Referenced image asset missing under static/images/posts.
action_items: Regenerate hero for changed post only.

patterns.summary: Unrecognized failure — needs human review.
action_items: Add new pattern to knowledge base if recurring.

patterns.summary: Hugo front matter chứa duplicate YAML keys, khiến build fail.
Content Direction Optimizer script failed — thường do front matter parse error.
action_items: Kiểm tra content/posts/ có file front matter lỗi

patterns.summary: Metadata optimizer (seo_title hoặc description) gặp lỗi front matter.
action_items: Kiểm tra front matter các file mới/thay đổi gần đây

patterns.summary: .gitignore blocks .webp files from git tracking. GitHub Actions checkout has no images → Deploy fails.
action_items: WebP files are generated but needed for GitHub Pages deploy

patterns.summary: One or more posts missing commit ID (commit = "" or field blank). CRITICAL: Every post MUST have commit = "sha" for traceability.
action_items: Run scripts/add_commit_id.py to inject current commit SHA into all posts
Verify: grep '""' content/posts/*.md should return 0 results

patterns.summary: Bài dùng category ngoài 5 canonical (review, cong-nghe, doi-song, tai-chinh, du-lich). TUYỆT ĐỐI không tạo category mới.
action_items: KHÔNG thêm item mới vào data/categories.json.
Map category lạ vào 1 trong 5 canonical qua bảng aliases; mặc định an toàn là doi-song (Đời sống).
Sửa front matter bài về đúng label canonical gần nhất.

patterns.summary: Một image provider (Pexels HOẶC Pixabay) bị rate limit. Ta có 2 API → đổi source, không fail vội.
action_items: Provider bị 429 → tự động chuyển sang provider còn lại (Pexels<->Pixabay).
Chỉ khi CẢ HAI provider đều 429 mới back off + retry sau (deploy FIFO >=30s).
Không dùng ảnh fake/placeholder khi rate limit.

patterns.summary: Đã thử CẢ 2 API (đổi source khi rate limit) mà không có ảnh hợp lệ → bài text-first là HỢP LỆ, không phải lỗi deploy.
action_items: Cho phép publish bài không ảnh dạng text-first (load nhanh, tốt SEO performance).
TUYỆT ĐỐI không chèn ảnh fake/placeholder/self-generated để lấp chỗ.
Chỉ chấp nhận text-first SAU KHI đã thử hết cả Pexels và Pixabay.

match: Liên kết nội bộ được sử dụng trong bài viết
Liên kết bên ngoài được sử dụng trong bài viết
patterns.summary: Bài hardcode 4 mục cuối bài (internal links / external links / FAQ / bản quyền) trong body thay vì để macro post-footer.html render từ front matter. Áp dụng mọi Category.
action_items: Không hardcode heading/nội dung 4 mục này trong body .md.
Move nội dung hardcode vào field FM tương ứng: [[internal_links]], [[external_links]], [[faq]], [attribution].
Chạy scripts/move_hardcoded_footer_sections.py --fix; dọn nợ hàng loạt ở PR qa-debt-fix riêng.

recent_failures.action: Kiểm tra content/posts/ có file front matter lỗi

autofix_history.detail: no fixer registered for python scripts/autobot_dup_remover.py --write

action_items.title: Kiểm tra content/posts/ có file front matter lỗi
Skip doctor/autofix when only reports changed.

VERIFIED_WITHOUT_CREATOR.reason: Source/license verified but creator empty - acceptable if API cannot resolve creator

MISSING_IMAGE_METADATA.reason: Recently added posts with placeholder images - scheduled for image sourcing
